  Thanks for contributing to NexaCore OS. Please fill in the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link the issue it closes: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation updated (docs/, crate docs, CHANGELOG) where relevant
- [ ] Every commit carries a `Signed-off-by:` trailer (`git commit --signoff`)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
